revision.comment: Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors. (bogus image options). strip trailing "px" off size parameter if present
revision.text: [[{{ safesubst:#switch:{{ safesubst:lc:{{{color|{{{colour|}}}}}} }} |green |grn |gn =File:Yes check.svg |lightgreen |lgreen |lgrn |lgn =File:Light green check.svg |red |rd |r =File:Red check.svg |darkred |dkred |drd |dr =File:Check-188-25-49-red.svg |pink |pnk |pk =File:Pink check.svg |orange |or |o =File:Check.svg |yellow |yel |y =File:Yellow check.svg |black |blk |k =File:Black check.svg |blue |blu |u =File:Check-blue.svg |lightblue |lblue |lblu |lb =File:Cornflower blue check.svg |cyan |cy |c =File:B-check.svg |purple |pur |pu =File:Purple check.svg |grey |gray |gry |gy =File:SemiTransBlack v.svg |brown |brn |bn =File:Brown check.svg |File:Yes check.svg }}|{{ safesubst:#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{1}}}}}|20}}px|link=|alt={{#if:{{{alt|}}}|{{{alt}}}|check}}]]Y {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
